use_cases: Triggering form submissions in authentication flows
Initiating navigation to key landing pages
Toggling like/heart states on social content
Confirming destructive actions with appropriate variant styling
Composing into larger interactive components via asChild prop
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing standard button variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports composition via asChild prop and includes focus-visible ring styling for keyboard accessibility. Designed to serve as a foundation for themed interactive elements like heart/like buttons.
